new_terms.context: Amphenol's internal cable set within the compute tray for Ethernet connections.
The base material for PCBs, categorized by grades like M7, M8, and M9 in the text.
High-grade copper foil (e.g., HVLP4) used to reduce surface roughness and signal loss.
The signal power lost as it travels through an interconnect channel.

new_terms.suggested_translation: 石英纤维布 / Q 玻纤
new_terms.context: A high-end reinforcing material for CCL to achieve lower dielectric constants.
The tendency of high-frequency current to flow near the surface of a conductor.
The specific compute board used in the Grace Blackwell (GB200/300) architecture.
A material property affecting signal speed and integrity in PCBs.
